title: Virtual Systems Analysis

jokes.text: "Kevin, please come over for gay sex." / "Why wouldn't you use 'Karen'?" / "'Cause it's gay sex, dummy."
jokes.setup: Troy shares his mnemonic device for biology classification
jokes.punchline: His literal-minded justification for why it has to be gay sex specifically
jokes.explanation: Perfect Troy character moment - his innocent literalism creates the comedy. The gay sex mnemonic is unexpected, but his defense of it is pure Troy logic.

jokes.text: "Why wouldn't you use 'Karen'?" "'Cause it's gay sex, dummy."
jokes.setup: Jeff suggests a more conventional name for the mnemonic
jokes.punchline: Troy matter-of-factly explains his logic as if it's obvious
jokes.explanation: Troy's deadpan commitment to his absurd logic. The 'dummy' adds character specificity - he thinks Jeff is being obtuse.

jokes.text: "Ah, the duali-Dean of man."
jokes.setup: Jeff observing the group's contradictory nature about work vs fun
jokes.punchline: Dean Pelton pun combining 'duality' with his name
jokes.explanation: Classic Jeff wordplay - economical and character-appropriate, though not groundbreaking

jokes.text: Dean dressed in elaborate costume for simple announcement
jokes.setup: Dean announces he has good news and bad news
jokes.punchline: He's dressed elaborately just to say class is cancelled
jokes.explanation: Pure Dean Pelton character comedy - his tendency to overdress for mundane occasions

jokes.text: "I could watch the first half of three movies."
jokes.setup: Group celebrating having three free hours
jokes.punchline: Abed's oddly specific and impractical way of thinking about time
jokes.explanation: Perfect Abed moment - his analytical mind applied to leisure time in an absurd way

jokes.text: "Their manager wears a tie."
jokes.setup: Troy explaining the fancy restaurant across town
jokes.punchline: His childlike measure of fanciness
jokes.explanation: Troy's innocent worldview - a tie makes a restaurant fancy in his mind

jokes.text: "You just keep turning left, but you end up up!"
jokes.setup: Annie knowing Troy likes the spiral parking ramp
jokes.punchline: Her excited explanation of how spiral ramps work
jokes.explanation: Annie's earnest excitement about Troy's simple pleasures is endearing and funny

jokes.text: He said Die Hard was bad. / I know, buddy.
jokes.setup: Abed repeats his serious objection to the manager
jokes.punchline: Troy's supportive response treats this as a legitimate grievance
jokes.explanation: Shows Troy's loyal friendship and shared values with Abed regarding pop culture.

jokes.text: "I can't go to Señor Kevin's. The manager and I are enemies. He said Die Hard was bad."
jokes.setup: Group planning where to eat
jokes.punchline: Abed's dramatic escalation over a movie opinion
jokes.explanation: Perfect Abed - treating a movie disagreement as serious enmity. Sets up recurring gag too.

jokes.text: "Is this a social cue?"
jokes.setup: Annie pressuring Abed about showing her the Dreamatorium
jokes.punchline: Abed's direct acknowledgment of social manipulation
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta moment - Abed recognizing the social mechanics at play while they're happening

jokes.text: Dean's confessional about going to the bank in costume
jokes.setup: Dean realizing he went too far with his costume
jokes.punchline: His mortification about having to go to the bank dressed up
jokes.explanation: Classic Dean cringe moment - his costume enthusiasm creating real-world awkwardness

jokes.text: "Come on, Craig. Get your life together."
jokes.setup: Dean's crisis about the bank visit
jokes.punchline: His self-talk addressing the core issue
jokes.explanation: Funny self-awareness moment, though the Dean addressing his bigger issues is understated

jokes.text: "Oi, gov'ner, quantum spammer, up an' at 'em, in'it?"
jokes.setup: Abed asks Geneva (Annie) for the quantum spanner
jokes.punchline: Annie's terrible British accent and mishearing 'spanner' as 'spammer'
jokes.explanation: Annie's bad accent work is endearing but not particularly clever

jokes.text: "It's Blorgons with an 'r'. Blo-gon means 'thank you' in blorgon."
jokes.setup: Annie mispronounces the alien species name
jokes.punchline: Abed's pedantic correction with made-up linguistics
jokes.explanation: Perfect Abed - his obsessive attention to fictional detail including invented language rules

jokes.text: "Can't we play something I know about like hospital administration?"
jokes.setup: Annie struggling with the sci-fi roleplay
jokes.punchline: Her preference for the most boring possible alternative
jokes.explanation: Great character moment - Annie's type-A personality wanting to play what she's competent at

jokes.text: "I kind of do." [have a patent on being a control freak]
jokes.setup: Annie saying Abed doesn't have a patent on being a control freak
jokes.punchline: Abed's matter-of-fact claim to control freak supremacy
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic timing and character truth - Abed's deadpan acknowledgment of his nature

jokes.text: Abed's elaborate explanation of the Dreamatorium's 'higher functions'
jokes.setup: Annie thinking the Dreamatorium is just for play
jokes.punchline: Abed's grandiose description of what's essentially an empty room
jokes.explanation: Great Abed moment - his ability to make the mundane sound profound and scientific

jokes.text: "I don't usually support lunch because it's unfair to breakfast."
jokes.setup: Troy enjoying the appetizers at lunch
jokes.punchline: His bizarre logic about meal loyalty
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Troy line - completely unexpected logic that somehow makes sense in his innocent worldview

jokes.text: "I guess that explains why you never see any two of them on the same table."
jokes.setup: Annie's comment about meals fighting each other
jokes.punchline: Troy's earnest observation about meal segregation
jokes.explanation: Perfect follow-up to the meal loyalty concept - Troy extending the absurd logic

jokes.text: "I'm too busy misunderstanding the whole point of Die Hard."
jokes.setup: Manager explaining why food will be delayed
jokes.punchline: Reference back to his film opinion that made him Abed's enemy
jokes.explanation: Nice callback that shows the manager is aware of and owns his controversial opinion

jokes.text: "Abed, it's cardboard tubes and a funnel."
jokes.setup: Abed explaining the Dreamatorium's elaborate 'engine'
jokes.punchline: Annie's blunt assessment of the actual materials
jokes.explanation: Perfect deflation of Abed's grandiosity with simple truth

jokes.text: "Well you see it that way because it's calibrated to a specific level of brain function... Not stupid, just less able to see what I see."
jokes.setup: Annie pointing out the Dreamatorium is just cardboard
jokes.punchline: Abed's condescending non-apology
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable but character-appropriate - Abed's superiority complex manifesting

jokes.text: "King of toilet paper rolls over here."
jokes.setup: Abed acting superior about his cardboard contraption
jokes.punchline: Annie's sarcastic deflation
jokes.explanation: Good Annie comeback - calling out Abed's pretension with specific imagery

jokes.text: "And another thing I hate about Die Hard, two FBI agents named Johnson."
jokes.setup: Manager continuing his Die Hard criticism
jokes.punchline: Oddly specific complaint about character naming
jokes.explanation: Continues the running gag with a pedantic film critique that mirrors Abed's style

jokes.text: Annie forcing empathy on Abed as a process step
jokes.setup: Annie frustrated with Abed's lack of empathy
jokes.punchline: Her systematic approach to making him consider others
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of conflict with Annie trying to systematize emotions like Abed systematizes everything else

jokes.text: "Oh, my God, I broke Abed."
jokes.setup: Abed suddenly collapses after Annie's empathy demand
jokes.punchline: Annie's panicked realization of consequences
jokes.explanation: Good escalation moment - the comedy of treating Abed like a machine that can malfunction

jokes.text: "Were we... doing it?" / "Are you being Jeff?"
jokes.setup: Abed waking up on the floor confused
jokes.punchline: His assumption they were having sex followed by Annie's immediate identification
jokes.explanation: Great moment - Abed's Jeff impression is so spot-on that Annie immediately recognizes it

jokes.text: "Well, I'm not being a Kardashian."
jokes.setup: Annie asking if he's being Jeff
jokes.punchline: Jeff's dismissive pop culture reference delivered through Abed
jokes.explanation: Good Jeff impression moment - his tendency toward pop culture dismissiveness

jokes.text: "damn our two foot height disparity, I want you."
jokes.setup: Jeff/Abed making romantic overtures to Annie
jokes.punchline: Acknowledging the actors' real height difference
jokes.explanation: Clever meta joke acknowledging real physical comedy of the height difference

jokes.text: "I'm a surgeon!" / "And I'm your administrator!"
jokes.setup: Annie trying to get information from Jeff
jokes.punchline: Escalating medical drama argument
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the medical drama parody with professional hierarchy conflict

jokes.text: "Who do you think inseminated her?"
jokes.setup: Jeff claiming he left his pregnant wife
jokes.punchline: Shocking revelation about paternity
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation that's shocking but fits the over-the-top medical drama parody

jokes.text: Truth serum confession sequence
jokes.setup: Annie injecting truth serum
jokes.punchline: Stream of embarrassing Jeff-like admissions
jokes.explanation: Great character excavation - revealing Jeff's insecurities through Abed's simulation

jokes.text: "I didn't get Inception."
jokes.setup: Series of Jeff confessions
jokes.punchline: Ultimate admission for someone who poses as sophisticated
jokes.explanation: Perfect capstone to the confession - the thing Jeff would be most ashamed to admit

jokes.text: "There's so many layers."
jokes.setup: Annie asking about seeing Abed's name in files
jokes.punchline: Reference to Inception after just admitting not understanding it
jokes.explanation: Brilliant immediate callback - Jeff referencing the movie he just admitted not understanding

jokes.text: "'Cause I think I'm on a train."
jokes.setup: Pierce as Alzheimer's patient explaining why he's out of bed
jokes.punchline: Simple, confused explanation
jokes.explanation: Touching but simple moment fitting Pierce's character and the scenario

jokes.text: "And there's more where that didn't come from."
jokes.setup: Pierce making dramatic gestures
jokes.punchline: Subversion of common phrase with dementia logic
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that works both as Pierce humor and dementia-affected speech

jokes.text: "Maybe Leonard was watching from the bushes and told Abed about it."
jokes.setup: Explaining how Abed could know about Jeff and Annie's kiss
jokes.punchline: Absurd but plausible Leonard scenario
jokes.explanation: Great use of Leonard as omnipresent background creep - absurd but believable

jokes.text: "I don't have cable."
jokes.setup: Leonard appearing after being mentioned
jokes.punchline: His non sequitur response
jokes.explanation: Perfect Leonard moment - appearing randomly with completely irrelevant information

jokes.text: "control freak with no empathy. People bend over backwards to cater to him. Signed, healthcare administrator Annie Edison."
jokes.setup: Reading Abed's patient file
jokes.punchline: Annie's earlier criticism now as official diagnosis
jokes.explanation: Smart callback that makes Annie's criticism into official psychological evaluation

jokes.text: "This is why you played matchmaker... there's nothing standing in the way of us."
jokes.setup: Jeff/Abed analyzing Annie's motivations
jokes.punchline: Accusation that matchmaking was about clearing path to Jeff
jokes.explanation: Good psychological insight that creates conflict and character revelation

jokes.text: "We're just in love with the idea of being loved."
jokes.setup: Annie examining her feelings about Jeff
jokes.punchline: Psychological insight about her romantic patterns
jokes.explanation: Deep character insight that's both funny and psychologically accurate

jokes.text: "Star Wars. Zardoz, Cougar Town, cool, cool, cool." / "Pop culture, pop culture. I'm on a TV show. Meta, meta."
jokes.setup: Annie realizing she's acting like Abed
jokes.punchline: Rapid-fire Abed impressions getting more meta
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta escalation - Annie doing Abed impressions while in Abed's simulation

jokes.text: "Can I just interject and say I don't know what the hell's going on?"
jokes.setup: Chaos of Annie being arrested for being Abed
jokes.punchline: Leonard's confused but calm observation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Leonard moment - matter-of-fact confusion in surreal situation

jokes.text: "Troy invents Dance Pants in 2019. Don't tell him, he needs to stumble onto it."
jokes.setup: Abed explaining his future predictions
jokes.punchline: Oddly specific future invention with protective advice
jokes.explanation: Perfect Abed moment - absurd specificity about the future combined with friendship protection

jokes.text: "Did we have a space odyssey? No, we got snowboarding in the Olympics and we over-validated Carson Daily."
jokes.setup: Annie explaining why science fiction isn't accurate
jokes.punchline: Specific examples of 2001's failed predictions vs. reality
jokes.explanation: Good observational humor about failed sci-fi predictions vs. mundane reality

jokes.text: "That poor guy." / "Yeah, cry me a river."
jokes.setup: Annie mentioning over-validating Carson Daly
jokes.punchline: Reference to his famous show while dismissing sympathy
jokes.explanation: Clever reference to 'Total Request Live' while maintaining the conversation flow

jokes.text: "You've got the body type." [for yoga]
jokes.setup: Abed considering taking up yoga
jokes.punchline: Annie's matter-of-fact assessment
jokes.explanation: Simple character moment - Annie's practical assessment of Abed's physicality

jokes.text: "Don't you mean 'whenever that is'?"
jokes.setup: Abed saying 'see you on the other side'
jokes.punchline: Annie's pedantic correction about time travel
jokes.explanation: Good Annie moment - her perfectionist nature applying to sci-fi dialogue conventions

jokes.text: "You'll blo-gon me for this later."
jokes.setup: Annie defeating the Blorgons
jokes.punchline: Using the alien language lesson from earlier
jokes.explanation: Good callback to the alien language moment, showing Annie learned from Abed's correction

jokes.text: "I almost sat on my balls, but at the last second, I made an adjustment."
jokes.setup: Pierce sharing his lunch experience
jokes.punchline: Anticlimactic story about avoiding physical discomfort
jokes.explanation: Classic Pierce overshare presented as meaningful story

jokes.text: Dean's bank story about deep conversations
jokes.setup: Dean's earlier mortification about his costume
jokes.punchline: His discovery that people actually enjoyed it
jokes.explanation: Nice resolution to the Dean's earlier anxiety - his weirdness actually connecting with people

jokes.text: "Okay, I didn't really avoid sitting on them. I sat right on them." / "Hurt like hell. I saw eagles."
jokes.setup: Pierce's earlier story about avoiding sitting on his balls
jokes.punchline: Revelation that he actually did sit on them, with dramatic consequences
jokes.explanation: Perfect Pierce moment - the truth is more dramatic and overshared than his original lie

jokes.text: "That's laser tag with sport coats."
jokes.setup: Troy mentioning 'blazer tag'
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact explanation of the obvious pun
jokes.explanation: Good Troy moment - explaining his obvious pun as if it needs clarification

jokes.text: Annie's bedroom makeover disaster and the guys' traumatic reaction
jokes.setup: Annie surprising them with bedroom changes
jokes.punchline: Their horrified reaction to her well-meaning improvements
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment - Annie's good intentions creating genuine distress for the guys

jokes.text: "We can put it back. We can put it back the way it was."
jokes.setup: Troy and Abed seeing their unbunked beds
jokes.punchline: Troy's panicked reassurance to traumatized Abed
jokes.explanation: Perfect ending moment - Troy protecting Abed from change, showing their deep friendship

tmdb_overview: After sending Troy and Britta on a date, Annie volunteers to keep Abed company in his Dreamatorium.
insight: Meta-commentary escalates through 55 jokes as study group dissects their own dynamics.
